nodes.name: Simeulue scops owl
nodes.summary: The Simeulue scops owl (Otus umbra) is an owl species endemic to the island of Simeulue, Indonesia. References External links BirdLife species factsheet for Otus umbra "Otus umbra". Avibase. "Simeulue scops owl media". Internet Bird Collection. Interactive range map of Otus umbra at IUCN Red List Audio recordings of Simeulue scops owl on Xeno-canto.

nodes.summary: Otus（Otus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如White-fronted scops owl、Andaman scops owl、Reddish scops owl等54种鸟类。
